company.name: DIY-Investors
company.mission: Serving DIY investors who want to manage their own stock market investments to secure their financial future
company.founder_background: Full-time investor, retired Chartered Quantity Surveyor, entrepreneur, and small business owner
company.target_audience: DIY investors managing their own portfolios who want control over their financial future

problem_solved.primary: Providing timely information and education to make better, more informed investment decisions
solutions: Education on combining fundamental and technical analysis
Monthly webinars with investing education and real-world insights

ai_for_investing.description: Monthly webinars, access to recordings, prompts and tutorial resources for applying AI to investing. No stock-specific information (only examples).
ai_for_investing.target_audience: Investors who want to gain the advantage AI offers but aren't sure where to start or how to apply AI for investing

inner_circle.description: Monthly webinars, access to recordings, annual stock filtering, choice of portfolio shares for each calendar year, access to demonstration portfolios.
inner_circle.target_audience: Serious DIY investors who want to invest on their own account

plaza_group.description: Everything in Inner Circle PLUS 4 extra quarterly webinars per year, daily access via Slack with weekday morning updates on two real money portfolios (ring-fenced within SIPP). All ups and downs shared. Portfolios have more than tripled in value since 27th January 2020.
plaza_group.target_audience: More experienced DIY investors who want daily access and real-world portfolio insights

boot_camp.description: Occasional in-person workshop events (not regular offering). Last held: Birmingham, 17 January 2026; previous: November 2023.

value_ladder.description: Most members start with Inner Circle, then some upgrade to Plaza Group. AI for Investing is a separate track that attracts both existing members and new people from YouTube channels.

tiers.goal: Get serious DIY investors started with webinars, portfolio guidance, and education
Provide experienced investors with daily access and real money portfolio transparency
Help investors leverage AI regardless of their investing experience level

brand_positioning.unique_angle: Combining fundamental and technical analysis with AI augmentation, plus live interactive Q&A sessions at webinars
brand_positioning.core_philosophy: The market is manipulated by insiders and brokers to profit from retail investors. DIY investors need independent thinking, facts, and rational analysis to succeed.
differentiators: Combines fundamental and technical analysis (not just one approach)
Uses AI to augment investing methods and techniques
Live Q&A sessions at end of every webinar (interactive, not aware of others doing this)
Daily Slack access to real money portfolios (Plaza Group)
Transparent about both wins and losses

principles: Do Your Own Research (DYOR) - the essence of DIY investing
Don't be afraid to go against herd mentality
Apply analysis and rational thinking over emotion
stands_against: Pushy stories and pump and dump operations
Coordinated media campaigns from market makers (word-for-word stories across outlets)
Brokers profiting at retail investors' expense
content_philosophy.contrarian_belief: Insiders manipulate 'Joe Public' to buy when they want to sell, and drop prices to shake out insecure retail investors. Ever seen a poor broker? Me neither!

portico_investing.name: Portico Investing
portico_investing.description: The application of knowledge about Market Makers' activities to make better investment decisions
